allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); a = d.get\('conversation_config', {}\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('first_message:', a.get\('agent', {}\).get\('first_message'\)[:80] if a.get\('agent', {}\).get\('first_message'\) else None\); p = a.get\('agent', {}\).get\('prompt', {}\); print\('llm:', p.get\('llm'\)\); print\('voice_id:', a.get\('tts', {}\).get\('voice_id'\)\); print\('tts_model:', a.get\('tts', {}\).get\('model_id'\)\); print\('tools:', [t.get\('name'\) for t in p.get\('tools', []\)]\); print\('kb:', [k.get\('name'\) for k in p.get\('knowledge_base', []\)]\)")
